title: First Impression of First Impression of NGE Thread
display_title: First Impression of First Impression of NGE Thread
wikitext:
[]: First Impression of First Impression of NGE Thread             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sat Feb 28, 2009 4:37 pm I'm a little disappointed by the fact that there are so few "First Impressions of Evangelion" threads around EGF. We really need more, with as many as four active at any given time. That being said, what was your first impression of the "Your first impression of NGE" thread that you read? Go ahead, don't be shy.

[]:             Quote Post by AyrYntake » Sat Feb 28, 2009 4:38 pm I prefer Evangelion.

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Sat Feb 28, 2009 4:39 pm 4/10. It wasn't as good as the "which character do you want to date" thread, but not as bad as "how does Shinji dress?" or "which music do the characters like" threads. They can't all be "Go Hikari!" can they?

[]:             Quote Post by Dartz » Sat Feb 28, 2009 4:42 pm It would've been so much better with Shinji as a girl, and Asuka as a dude... and Shinjix Rei would be by far an amost the winningnest pairing then for sure to be sure.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sat Feb 28, 2009 4:43 pm I think my favorite first impressions thread was the one where Birdy blogged her thoughts on NGE episode by episode. I would give it a 7/10. The score would have been higher, but she never finished the series.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Sat Feb 28, 2009 4:47 pm if we had multiple 'first impression' threads, we could probably have one entirely dedicated to image only reaction-face replies. That would be sugoi.

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Sat Feb 28, 2009 4:48 pm slothen wrote: if we had multiple 'first impression' threads, we could probably have one entirely dedicated to image only reaction-face replies. That would be sugoi.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sat Feb 28, 2009 4:49 pm ZapalacX wrote: slothen wrote: if we had multiple 'first impression' threads, we could probably have one entirely dedicated to image only reaction-face replies. That would be sugoi.

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Sat Feb 28, 2009 5:06 pm 3/10, because most of these threads lack neko, which is my favorite animal.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Sat Feb 28, 2009 5:08 pm My first impression was "Damn it why do these doozy bots always wanna know what my first impression was? Like hell I'm going to tell them what my first impression was!" And then I did some stuff that I can't remember very well after that. But there's a good chance it involved me having naughty tentacle girl fantasys.

[]:             Quote Post by Tokpile Quohog » Sat Feb 28, 2009 8:25 pm BrikHaus wrote: Or oishii.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Feb 28, 2009 8:26 pm I thought some of the responses were well-thought out, other then that I didn't really think either way about them.

[]:             Quote Post by The Bastard King » Sat Feb 28, 2009 11:18 pm I enjoyed the one about Anti-Spirals being behind everything. Wait what?

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Sun Mar 01, 2009 2:10 pm I'm not sure really, I saw the topics as any other topics I would see on a forum like Naruto fan or MFG.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Tue Mar 03, 2009 2:35 pm Copy/paste your previous thoughts about the first time you watched EoE. And also, Ogata scream. And also also, Commentary of Doom.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Mar 03, 2009 7:19 pm My favorite was the one with Birdy's reactions while watching NGE. It was lulzy. Too bad she dropped it. My first impression of this thread was "Oh lulz" as well.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Mar 03, 2009 7:55 pm My first impression of this thread was that maybe it was lock-worthy material. But then I reevaluated my premenstrual symptoms and decided that they weren't bad enough to make me want to actually hit that "lock" button. Too bad. My impression of first impression threads is that there are too many of them, and they're a real pain in the ass to keep track of, and maybe I'll melt some of them together someday when I am really THAT bored (i.e., that desperate to avoid doing more important things).

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Wed Mar 04, 2009 10:47 pm lol nubs, it was first impression of the OTHER thread, not first impression of this thread.
